titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the George G. Gyrisco papers, [ca. 1940]-1984.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by H. Finch

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the George G. Gyrisco Papers,[ca. 1940]-1984.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2003 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: George G. Gyrisco papers,
did.physdesc: Correspondence, notes, reports, newsletters, photographs, and other files.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Files on graduate students and undergraduate advisees; general correspondence and subject files relating to entomology; research and conference notes and reports, files on insect control research and recommendations, and extension newsletters. Includes photographs of people and projects in Gyrisco's career.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: George Gordon Gyrisco, born 1920, received his Ph.D from Cornell University in 1947.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files on graduate students and undergraduate advisees; general correspondence and subject files relating to entomology; research and conference notes and reports, files on insect control research and recommendations, and extension newsletters. Includes photographs of people and projects in Gyrisco's career.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Dept. of Entomology.

did.unittitle: Commercial Correspondence, 1947-1984 , A-P, filed by corporation, i.e., CIBA, DuPont, Hooker
Same, S-Z; Grants-in-aid, A-Z, filed by corporation, i.e., Agway, Velsical; County Agents Correspondence,
Same, 1960-1983 ; Forage Crops Correspondence, Forage Insect Correspondence, 1958-1971 ; Extension Letters; Department of Entomology Letters; Personal Correspondence
"Weekly Report on Insect, Diseases and Crop Development," 1967-1982 [unsorted]; "Cornell Fact Sheet: Chemical-Pesticide Program," 1965-1973 [unsorted]

Jugatae Newsletter, 1949 - ; Department Newsletter; TIEG Newsletter, 1971 - ; "Comstock Comments," 1977-1978 ; "Weekly Reports on Insects ... to County Agents," 1964 ; "Cornell Fact Sheet: Chemicals-Pesticides Program," 1966 ; Computer Center Reports, University in Turmoil, 1968-1969 ; Comprehensive Review, Department of Entomology,
Northeast Aerial Applicator's Conference, 18 vols., 1966-1983 ; NYS Insecticide and Fungicide Recommendations,
NYS Insecticide and Fungicide Recommendations, 1964, 1966, 1969, 1971-1976, [1955-1962 , on microfilm in Mann Library]; Various college publications and material relative to NY agriculture
[Eliminated by removal of duplicates during processing]

Forage insects bibliography; Correspondence of Professor H.H. Schwardt, 1938-1946 ; European Chafer Reports, 1942-1954 ; Clover Root Borer Reports, 1937-1946 ; Seed Corn Maggot Reports, 1940-1949 ; Mexican Bean Beetle Reports, 1937-1944 ; General Forage Insects
Graduate Student files, A-L
Graduate Student files, L-Z
Undergraduate advisees and general correspondence
Insecticide research reports, 1947-1963 , Phyllophaga Reports and Data, 1936-1945 , Alfalfa Snout Beetle Reports and Data, 1934-1947 , Class notes and laboratory texts
General correspondence, A-W, 1949-1981 , Entomological Society of American, Extension
USDA, College and Department committees files
College and Department committee files
University files, Laboratory requirements, Project statements
Grant information NSF, NIH & CU, Insecticide residue research on milk, poultry, etc.
Insecticide residue in milk, 1950s and 1960s , NE-36 reports, Birdsfoot trefoil experiments
Insect control research and recommendations, NE-36 reports on pesticide residue in ... commodities, European chafer, Alfalfa snout beetle, photographs
Forage crop program, Forage insect recommendations, Alfalfa Weevil
Alfalfa weevil conferences,
Alfalfa weevil material including photos, Cereal leaf beetle projects, Department requirements for admissions, Grant proposals, Jugatae, Papers and lectures
General files including teaching, research and professional information, 1940-1982 , Manuscripts of articles, 1940-1982
Annual reports of forage insect infestation, 1948-1982 , Multiple copies of 12th Annual Report, 1959 , Retirement material, 1976-1977 , Conference papers
General files including teaching, community activity, correspondence, reports,
Photos: Riverhead, New York, 1943,1946; Near Bellville, New York,
Photos: Outside Comstock Hall, 1944; Insectory
Photos: George Gyrisco
Photos: Near Malone, New York (releasing parasites),
Photos: Student/Staff, Cornell (individual),
Photos: Student/Staff, Cornell (individual),
Photos: Student/Staff, Cornell (individual),
Photos: Student/Staff (group),
Photos: Other students
Photos: Student/Staff, Massachusetts State University,

scopecontent.p: Includes photocopy portrait of Lotta Crabtree

did.unittitle: Photos: Professor Herbert Schwardt and Charles Palm
Photos: Near Minetto lab, Oswego, New York (with Charles Palm?),
Photos: Student/Staff - collage of photos
Papers on Comstock Hall history, forage crop history in entomology, and evolution/biblical thinking
Personal correspondence, 1974-1983

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Files of graduate students and undergraduate advisees (Box 10, 11, 12), and personal correspondence (Box 29) may be used and reproduced until 2030 only with the permission of the Head of the Department of Entomology at Cornell University.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: George G. Gyrisco papers, #21-23-2228. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
